title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 302.250 - Children forbidden to operate motor vehicle
text:
302.250.  Children forbidden to operate motor vehicle. — No person shall cause or knowingly permit his child or ward under the age of sixteen years to drive a motor vehicle upon any highway when such minor is not authorized hereunder or in violation of any of the provisions of sections 302.010 to 302.260.
(RSMo 1939 § 8466)
